_comment: Glossary generation queue. Each entry produces ONE JSON at content/data/glossary/<slug>.json via coveredusa-glossary-writer. Status: queued / writing / verified / flagged / write_failed.

terms.notes: What you pay before insurance kicks in. 2026 ACA Bronze ~$7,500 avg; Silver ~$5,500; Gold ~$2,000; Platinum ~$500. Some services pre-deductible (preventive care, ACA EHB). HDHP definition link.
Fixed dollar amount per service ($25 PCP visit, $50 specialist, $10 prescription tier 1, etc.). Different from coinsurance. Often doesn't count toward deductible but does count toward OOP max.
Percentage you pay after deductible (20% Medicare Part B standard). Different from copay. Counts toward OOP max.

Income definition for ACA premium tax credits and most Medicaid categories. Wages + self-employment + taxable Social Security + capital gains. Excludes child support, SSI, some VA benefits. IRS + healthcare.gov sources. term=spelled-out, alternateNames=['MAGI'].

ACA marketplace subsidy. Enhanced PTC under ARPA/IRA EXPIRED Jan 1, 2026. For 2026 plans, the subsidy cliff at 400% FPL is back. Critical: do not say the cliff is extended. Source: IRS + Congress.gov.
60-day window after qualifying life event (job loss, marriage, birth, move, etc.) to enroll outside OEP. Specific event triggers vary. Source: healthcare.gov.
Not a bill. Document insurer sends after claim showing what they paid + what you owe. Bridges insurance and the bill. Common confusion: people pay EOB as if it's the bill.
Insurer pre-approval requirement before covered care. Common for imaging, specialty drugs, surgeries. Frustration point for patients. CMS proposed rules to streamline starting 2026.
Plan meeting IRS HDHP requirements for HSA eligibility. 2026 minimum deductibles: $1,650 self-only / $3,300 family. 2026 OOP max: $8,500/$17,000. Pairs with HSA tax-advantaged account.

Out-of-network provider bills you the difference between what they charged and what insurance paid. No Surprises Act 2022 banned most surprise balance billing in emergency + non-emergency in-network facility scenarios. Helpline 1-800-985-3059.
